strengths: 6+ years of full-stack experience well exceeded, with deep TypeScript/Node.js work directly aligned to the primary stack
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the required AI agent development skill
Polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C/C++, Python-adjacent) with proven architecture, TDD, CI/CD, and Docker/Kubernetes experience
concerns: React experience is present but less emphasized than backend/Node work in recent roles
Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly named in the resume, though adjacent frameworks (Jest-style testing, Node services) are well covered
PostgreSQL experience not explicitly listed — MongoDB and MySQL are the named relational/NoSQL stores

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, architecture, cloud/containers

response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack delivery with the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and is currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq — a direct match for one of the role's distinguishing requirements. Across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, Dunnhumby and earlier roles he has shipped production systems with AWS, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, GraphQL and rigorous TDD/CI/CD practices, and has founded and maintained an open-source GIS platform end-to-end. Combined with polyglot fluency (Java, DLang, C/C++), teaching/workshop experience, and a clear craftsmanship ethos, he is a strong fit for a senior full-stack IC role focused on internal automation tooling and agentic workflows.
